findings.evidence: `mathlib/Mathlib/NumberTheory/MahlerMeasure.lean:55` defines `Polynomial.boxPoly : Set ℤ[X] := {p | p.natDegree ≤ n ∧ ∀ i, B₁ i ≤ p.coeff i ∧ p.coeff i ≤ B₂ i}` and `:57` proves `ncard_boxPoly`.
findings.fix: Use `Polynomial.boxPoly D (fun _ => -(C : ℝ)) (fun _ => (C : ℝ))` or add only a local equivalence lemma if this spelling is needed downstream, rather than a new public box definition.
findings.issue: `intPolynomialBox` is a parallel bounded-degree integer coefficient box API; the same family is the constant-bound instance of Mathlib's `Polynomial.boxPoly`, up to the `natAbs`/interval spelling.

findings.evidence: The new proof ends with `exact TauCeti.Polynomial.ncard_natDegree_le_abs_intCoeff_le D C` at `PolynomialCount.lean:86`; the existing theorem is at `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Polynomial/CardBoundedCoeff.lean:70` with the same bound.
findings.fix: Expose or use `TauCeti.Polynomial.ncard_natDegree_le_abs_intCoeff_le` directly, or state only the minimal rewrite lemma connecting the desired set spelling to that theorem.
findings.issue: `card_intPolynomial_degree_height_le` is just a restatement of the existing TauCeti absolute-coefficient count after rewriting `natAbs` to `|_|`.

findings.evidence: `mathlib/Mathlib/Algebra/Polynomial/Degree/Operations.lean:93` proves `ext_iff_natDegree_le`; `code/TauCeti/Algebra/Polynomial/CardBoundedCoeff.lean:62-65` uses it for the same coefficient-vector injection.
findings.fix: Remove it and use `Polynomial.ext_iff_natDegree_le` at the call site, as the existing TauCeti count proof already does.
findings.issue: `coeffVec_injOn` exports a duplicate bounded-degree coefficient-vector injectivity lemma.

summary: The PR adds namespace-specific wrappers around existing polynomial box/count/extensionality APIs. Reuse the existing Mathlib/TauCeti statements instead of exporting parallel public declarations.
